title: Fix hierarchical verilation with explicit setting of default parameter value
body:
I recently found that hierarchical block with parameters is not properly handled when its caller set the parameter with the default value.
e.g.
```systemverilog
module caller();
   sub #(.P(42)) i_sub();
endmodule
module sub #(parameter P = 42) (); /*verilator hier_block*/
endmodule
```

- If a hierarchical block has parameters, its name will be always mangled even when no parameter is overridden by caller
- Explicit setting of default value is not treated `overridden`
